headline: PG&E Surpasses 1 Million Customer Solar Interconnections--Most of Any U.S. Utility
summary: Pacific Gas and Electric Company (PG&E) today announced that it has surpassed 1 million customers with solar systems connected to its electric grid—more than any utility in the United States—marking a defining moment in the evolution of customer‑driven clean energy in California.

headline: Is PG&E Corporation Stock Underperforming the S&P 500?
summary: While PG&E Corporation has underperformed the S&P 500 Index, analysts remain highly optimistic about the stock’s prospects.
